text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":["Six months ago, I joined Tripex as a Flutter developer. On my first day, I pulled the mobile app repository and ran ",["$","code",null,{"className":"bg-gray-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono text-[#302B65]","children":"flutter build"}],". Then I waited. And waited. When the build finally finished 8 minutes later, I knew I had my work cut out for me."]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"What I discovered was a codebase that had grown organically over two years—features layered on top of features, business logic scattered across UI files, and state management that seemed to follow no discernible pattern. It worked. It was in production. But it was also a minefield."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"This is the story of why we refactored it, what we learned, and why good architecture isn't just nice to have—it's essential for survival."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-[#302B65] mb-4 mt-8","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"The Real Cost of Technical Debt"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Technical debt doesn't announce itself. It accumulates in small decisions:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc ml-6 mb-4 space-y-2","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":["$","em",null,{"children":"\"I'll just put this logic here for now\""}]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":["$","em",null,{"children":"\"We don't have time to set up proper state management\""}]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"$L3"}],"\n"]}],"\n","$L4","\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22","\n","$L23","\n","$L24","\n","$L25","\n","$L26","\n","$L27","\n","$L28","\n","$L29","\n","$L2a","\n","$L2b","\n","$L2c","\n","$L2d","\n","$L2e","\n","$L2f","\n","$L30","\n","$L31","\n","$L32","\n","$L33","\n","$L34","\n","$L35"]}]]}],"$L36"]}]}],null,"$L37"]}],"loading":null,"isPartial":false}
3:["$","em",null,{"children":"\"This API call can live in the widget, it's just one screen\""}]
4:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"At Tripex, these decisions had compounded. The app had:"}]
5:["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc ml-6 mb-4 space-y-2","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Inconsistent state management"}]," - Some screens used setState, others used Provider, a few used Riverpod, and one mysterious corner used BLoC"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Widget files exceeding 1,000 lines"}]," - Business logic, UI, and API calls all living together"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"No separation of concerns"}]," - The concept of \"layers\" was more suggestion than architecture"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Testing? What testing?"}]," - Zero unit tests, minimal widget tests"]}],"\n"]}]
6:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"The app worked. Users were happy. But every new feature took longer than the last. Every bug fix risked breaking three other things. Onboarding new developers took weeks because understanding the codebase required holding the entire mental model in your head at once."}]
7:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-[#302B65] mb-4 mt-8","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"The Breaking Point"}]
8:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Our breaking point came when we needed to add a major feature: multi-language support. What should have been a straightforward implementation—swap out some strings, add a locale switcher—became a nightmare."}]
9:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Text was hardcoded everywhere. Some strings lived in widgets. Others came from API responses with no localization keys. Some were concatenated dynamically. After two weeks of hunting down every hardcoded string, we realized the real problem: we weren't just adding a feature. We were fighting our own codebase."}]
a:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"That's when we made the decision: we were going to refactor. Not a rewrite—that's usually a trap—but a systematic refactoring to clean house."}]
b:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-[#302B65] mb-4 mt-8","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"The Refactoring Strategy"}]
c:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":["We didn't shut down development for three months. Instead, we adopted the ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"Boy Scout Rule"}],": leave the codebase better than you found it."]}]
d:["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-bold text-[#050505] mb-3 mt-6","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Week 1-2: Establishing the Foundation"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"We started with architecture. We chose Riverpod for state management—not because it's trendy, but because it provided the consistency we desperately needed. We established clear layers:"}]
f:["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc ml-6 mb-4 space-y-2","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Presentation layer"}],": Widgets, dumb and focused only on UI"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Business logic layer"}],": Services and controllers handling business rules"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Data layer"}],": Repositories managing API calls and local storage"]}],"\n"]}]
10:["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-bold text-[#050505] mb-3 mt-6","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Week 3-6: The Great Extraction"}]
11:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Screen by screen, we extracted business logic from widgets. A 1,200-line widget became:"}]
12:["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc ml-6 mb-4 space-y-2","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"A 150-line widget focused purely on UI"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"A controller class managing state and business logic"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Repository methods handling data operations"}],"\n"]}]
13:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"The immediate benefit? We could write unit tests for the first time. When business logic lives in widgets, it's nearly impossible to test. When it's in a controller, testing becomes straightforward."}]
14:["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-bold text-[#050505] mb-3 mt-6","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Week 7-10: Feature Flags and Gradual Migration"}]
15:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"We used feature flags to deploy changes gradually. New architecture for new features, refactored code for old ones. This let us validate our approach without risking everything."}]
16:["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-bold text-[#050505] mb-3 mt-6","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Week 11-12: Cleanup and Documentation"}]
17:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"We deleted dead code. So much dead code. Features that were built but never launched. Experiments that became permanent by accident. Thousands of lines, gone."}]
18:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"We also documented our architecture decisions. Not just for future developers, but for ourselves—so we wouldn't make the same mistakes again."}]
19:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-[#302B65] mb-4 mt-8","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"The Results"}]
1a:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Six weeks of focused refactoring yielded results we couldn't have imagined:"}]
1b:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Build time: 8 minutes → 2 minutes"}],"\nLess code, better structure, fewer dependencies to resolve."]}]
1c:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"New feature implementation: 2 weeks → 3 days"}],"\nClear separation of concerns meant we could work on UI, business logic, and data layers in parallel."]}]
1d:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Bug rate: 40% reduction"}],"\nFewer side effects, better test coverage, and code that was actually readable meant fewer bugs shipped to production."]}]
1e:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Developer onboarding: 3 weeks → 3 days"}],"\nNew team members could understand the architecture in hours, not days. The codebase had a clear rhythm."]}]
1f:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Test coverage: 0% → 68%"}],"\nFor the first time, we had confidence in our deployments. Refactoring with tests felt safe. Without them, it would have been terrifying."]}]
20:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-[#302B65] mb-4 mt-8","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"What I Wish I Knew Earlier"}]
21:["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-bold text-[#050505] mb-3 mt-6","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Architecture Isn't Premature Optimization"}]
22:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"There's a myth that \"we'll fix it later\" is a valid strategy. It's not. Technical debt compounds like credit card interest. The longer you wait, the harder it is to pay down."}]
23:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Good architecture from day one doesn't mean over-engineering. It means thinking about separation of concerns, about where logic should live, about how your app will grow."}]
24:["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-bold text-[#050505] mb-3 mt-6","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Refactoring Isn't a Dirty Word"}]
25:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":["Developers often treat refactoring as admitting failure. ",["$","em",null,{"children":"\"If I had written it right the first time...\""}]]}]
26:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Here's the truth: you can't write perfect code when you don't fully understand the problem. The first implementation teaches you what the system actually needs. Refactoring is the process of applying those lessons."}]
27:["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-bold text-[#050505] mb-3 mt-6","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"The Best Time to Refactor Is Continuously"}]
28:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Don't wait for a \"refactoring sprint.\" Make it part of your daily work:"}]
29:["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc ml-6 mb-4 space-y-2","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"See duplicated code? Extract it."}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Touching a messy widget? Clean up what you're working on."}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Writing a new feature? Don't repeat the mistakes of the past."}],"\n"]}]
2a:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Small, continuous improvements prevent the need for massive refactors."}]
2b:["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-bold text-[#050505] mb-3 mt-6","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Tests Are Your Safety Net"}]
2c:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"I can't emphasize this enough: don't refactor without tests. Our first attempts at refactoring broke things because we had no way to verify behavior hadn't changed."}]
2d:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Once we had test coverage, refactoring became... dare I say... enjoyable? We could make bold changes with confidence. The tests told us when we broke something immediately, not after deployment."}]
2e:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-[#302B65] mb-4 mt-8","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Practical Takeaways for Your Next Project"}]
2f:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"If you're starting fresh or inheriting a mess, here's what I'd recommend:"}]
30:["$","ol",null,{"className":"list-decimal ml-6 mb-4 space-y-2","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Choose your architecture deliberately"}]," - Don't just use what you used last time. Consider your team's size, the app's complexity, and your growth trajectory."]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Separate concerns from day one"}]," - UI handles UI. Business logic handles rules. Data layer handles data. Don't mix them."]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Write tests as you go"}]," - Retrofitting tests is painful. Writing them as you build is natural, and it makes refactoring later possible."]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Document your decisions"}]," - Why did you choose this state management solution? Why this folder structure? Future you (and your teammates) will thank you."]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Refactor continuously"}]," - Leave every file better than you found it. Small improvements compound."]}],"\n"]}],"\n"]}]
31:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-[#302B65] mb-4 mt-8","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"The Bottom Line"}]
32:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"Refactoring the Tripex app was one of the hardest things I've done as a developer. It required discipline, patience, and the courage to change what was already \"working.\""}]
33:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"But it was also one of the most valuable experiences. I learned that good architecture isn't about following patterns—it's about making your codebase a place where developers can be productive, where features can be added without fear, and where technical debt doesn't accumulate like sediment."}]
34:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"The app that took 8 minutes to build and terrified us to touch now builds in 2 minutes and welcomes new features. The team that dreaded certain parts of the codebase now understands it confidently."}]
35:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed text-[#414141]","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":"That's the power of good architecture. That's why refactoring matters."}]
36:["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-16 pt-8 border-t border-gray-100","children":["$","$L2",null,{"href":"/blog","className":"inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-[#302B65] hover:underline","style":{"fontFamily":"Poppins, sans-serif"},"children":[["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","strokeWidth":2,"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","className":"lucide lucide-chevron-left w-4 h-4","aria-hidden":"true","children":[["$","path","1wnfg3",{"d":"m15 18-6-6 6-6"}],"$undefined"]}],"Back to all posts"]}]}]
37:["$","$L38",null,{"children":["$","$39",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@3a"}]}]
3a:null
